backend.changelog: Generate now reliably re-downloads stale parts and assemblies from the platform so STEP, 3D PDF and thumbnails reflect the current server content. Only items whose platform version actually changed are refreshed (no needless re-downloads of an up-to-date cache). Still refuses to generate when SolidWorks is on a different 3DEXPERIENCE tenant than the BOM.

cadBridge.changelog: Stale parts and assemblies are now actually refreshed: the agent frees the local cache slot of each changed item so SolidWorks re-downloads the latest geometry (previously the cached copy was reused, so outputs looked fresh but held old content). Identity-based and surgical - never touches a shared, virtual-component, or unsaved-changes file.
